nasb.text: And when He had taken a cup and given thanks, He said, “Take this and share it among yourselves;

esv.text: And he took a cup, and when he had given thanks he said, “Take this, and divide it among yourselves.

cnv.text: 耶穌接過杯來，感謝了，說：“你們拿這個，大家分著喝。

ccb.text: 祂接过杯来，祝谢后，说：“你们拿去分着喝吧。

csbs.text: 耶稣拿起杯来，祝谢了，说：“你们拿这个，大家分着喝。
